description_long: This is a medium-sized ceramic cup with a gently flared cylindrical body and a rounded base. The cup features a prominent, smoothly curved handle attached to one side, allowing for easy gripping. On the front, the cup displays the text 'I.P.S.' in bold, uppercase letters, with a smaller line of text beneath it, suggesting branding or a logo. The surface of the cup appears matte and uniform in color, with no visible decorative patterns aside from the printed text. The interior is hollow, designed to hold liquids, and the rim is slightly thickened for comfortable drinking. The overall appearance is utilitarian yet slightly refined, suitable for use in urban environments such as cafes, offices, or public spaces.
description: A matte ceramic cup with a curved handle and 'I.P.S.' branding on the front, designed for holding liquids. The surface is smooth and unadorned except for the printed text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain, unmarked side of the cup with no handle visible.
description_view_1: Angled view displaying the handle on the right and the 'I.P.S.' branding clearly visible on the front.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the handle's attachment and the back of the cup, with no branding visible.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the handle on the left and the 'I.P.S.' branding on the front.
